name: SAP Fieldglass Business Analytics API Examples
description: Request examples for the SAP Fieldglass Business Analytics API

examples.summary: Get a list of available reports
examples.description: Returns a list of all available reports including the report ID and name.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: Only required for production access when using SAP Fieldglass.

parameters.name: X-ApplicationKey
parameters.description: The company-specific key provided by SAP Fieldglass for API access. Required for production access.

examples.description: Returns report data for the report ID specified by the user.

parameters.name: report_id
parameters.description: The ID of the report. You can obtain it by getting the list of available reports.

parameters.name: Authorization
parameters.description: Only required for production access when using SAP Fieldglass.

parameters.name: X-ApplicationKey
parameters.description: The company-specific key provided by SAP Fieldglass for API access. This is required for production access.
